web.title: Studygenie | AI Study Tools for Quizzes, Flashcards & More
web.description: Turn your notes, slides, and textbooks into AI study quizzes, flashcards, and more in seconds. Trusted by 60000+ students. Try Studygenie free.
web.markdown:
Ethical AI, maintaining academic integrity

# Thefastestway to ace any exam

Upload your notes, slides, or textbook. Studygenie's AI creates study tools like practice quizzes, flashcards, podcasts, and more in just seconds

[Get Started Free](https://app.studygenie.io/)

Ethical AI, maintaining academic integrity

How it works

## Three steps, zero effort

Upload anything you're studying. Get high-quality AI study tools in seconds.

01

### Upload your materials

Drop in your lecture slides, textbook PDFs, or notes. We handle any file format you throw at us.

02

### AI analyzes your content

Our AI reads every page, extracts key concepts, and builds study materials tailored to your content.

microeconomics\_ch7.pdf

42 pages

5%

Extracting key concepts

Mapping topic relationships

Generating study questions

Building flashcard deck

03

### Start practicing

Jump into quizzes, flashcards, or podcasts generated from your exact material. Study smarter, not harder.

Ready to study

3 tools generated

Quiz

24 questions

Start

Flashcards

48 cards

Start

Podcast

12 min

Start

## Everything you need to ace your exams

Six AI-powered tools that turn any course material into an interactive study experience.

## Every other AI study tool is failing you.

Other tools generate generic questions and call it a day. Studygenie uses proprietary AI to actually prepare you for the exam.

### Other AI Study Tools

Fixed number of questions per document, regardless of content

Surface-level recall questions that don't make you think

No support for textbooks, chapters, or structured materials

10 Questions Generated

Generic AI quiz generator

![Studygenie](https://studygenie.io/logos/sg-wordmark-white.svg)

Dynamically generates questions based on every key concept and term

Questions built on academic research to test real understanding

Full textbook support with chapter selection and targeted studying

Sound familiar?

## Studying feels harder than it should

- ![Lost in long lectures](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/headphone.svg)



### Lost in long lectures



"I zoned out 20 minutes in... now I'm completely lost"

- ![Scattered notes](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/open-folder.svg)



### Scattered notes



"Scattered across Google Docs, Notion, and random papers"

- ![Read it. Forgot it](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/circle.svg)



### Read it. Forgot it



"I read this chapter 3 times and still can't remember it"

- ![Stuck with no help](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/message.svg)



### Stuck with no help



"It's midnight, I'm confused, and there's no one to explain this to me"


There's a better way. Mindgrasp AI study tool turns chaos into a structured study system — automatically.

[Start My Free Study Session![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/arrow-right.svg)](https://app.mindgrasp.ai/get-started)

Introducing Mindgrasp...

## We turn your material into a complete AI study system

Upload your material and Mindgrasp builds your entire AI study session — notes, flashcards, quizzes, summary, and AI tutor included.

- ![AI Notes icon](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-notes-icon.svg)



### AI Notes



Notes that write themselves







Get structured notes in seconds — so you can focus on understanding, not typing. Less cognitive overload, more actual learning.



![AI Notes illustration](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-notes.svg)
- ![AI Summary icon](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-summary-icon.svg)



### AI Summary



Review faster, anytime







Turn lengthy lectures, articles, or textbooks into quick, scannable summaries so you understand the topic fast. Perfect before tests or quick revision.



![AI Summary illustration](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-summary.svg)
- ![AI Flashcards icon](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-flashcards-icon.svg)



### AI Flashcards



Make It Impossible to Forget







Auto-generate flashcards from your material and practice active recall — the science-backed method that makes information stick.



![AI Flashcards illustration](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-flashcards.svg)
- ![AI Quizzes icon](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-quizzes-icon.svg)



### AI Quizzes



Test yourself before exams do







Auto-generate quizzes directly from your material. Check your understanding, spot gaps early, and find weak spots before the exam does.



![AI Quizzes illustration](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-quizzes.svg)
- ![AI Tutor icon](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-chat-icon.svg)



### AI Tutor



Ask questions. Get clarity 24/7







Chat with the AI Tutor, available 24/7, to explain concepts, clear confusion, and help you learn at your own pace. No more waiting for office hours.



![AI Tutor illustration](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/intro-mindgrasp/ai-chat.svg)

## Upload anything. Learn everything

Record live lectures or upload any file. Mindgrasp instantly turns them into notes, summaries, flashcards, quizzes, and a 24/7 AI tutor.

- ![PowerPoint File](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/upload-anything/powerpoint.svg)

### Any file. Any format. Any subject.

PDFs, slides, YouTube videos, audio, web links, and more

[Start My Free Study Session![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/arrow-right.svg)](https://app.mindgrasp.ai/get-started)

1. 1





### Create a Study Session



One session per lecture, chapter, or exam topic. A dedicated space where everything stays organized from the start.





![New Session](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/new-session.webp)
2. 2





### Record lectures or upload anything



In class? Hit record and capture your lecture in real-time. At home? Upload your PDFs, slides, videos, or links.





![Record or Upload](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/record-or-upload.webp)
3. 3





### Instant AI Processing



Mindgrasp instantly processes your content and generates notes, a summary, flashcards, quizzes, and an AI tutor. Everything you need, ready in seconds.





![AI Processing](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/processing.webp)
4. 4





### Learn, Practice, Ask, Master



Review your notes, practice with flashcards, test yourself with quizzes, and ask the AI Tutor when you're stuck. Access everything anytime, anywhere, on any device.





![Learn, Practice, Ask, Master](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/learn-practice-ask-master.webp)

1

### Create a Study Session

One session per lecture, chapter, or exam topic. A dedicated space where everything stays organized from the start.

2

### Record lectures or upload anything

In class? Hit record and capture your lecture in real-time. At home? Upload your PDFs, slides, videos, or links.

3

### Instant AI Processing

Mindgrasp instantly processes your content and generates notes, a summary, flashcards, quizzes, and an AI tutor. Everything you need, ready in seconds.

4

### Learn, Practice, Ask, Master

Review your notes, practice with flashcards, test yourself with quizzes, and ask the AI Tutor when you're stuck. Access everything anytime, anywhere, on any device.

![New Session](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/new-session.webp)![Record or Upload](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/record-or-upload.webp)![AI Processing](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/processing.webp)![Learn, Practice, Ask, Master](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/how-it-works/learn-practice-ask-master.webp)

## AI study tools built on how your brain learns

Every feature is built on proven cognitive science, so you learn faster without the burnout.

### Active RecallAI Flashcards

Retrieving information beats rereading every time. Mindgrasp auto-generates flashcards so you can practice real recall.

### Practice TestingAI Quizzes

Testing yourself improves exam performance more than rereading. Mindgrasp generates quizzes so you find gaps early.

![Brain](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/brain.svg)

### Spaced RepetitionAI Notes

Reviewing over time locks information into long-term memory. Mindgrasp creates organized notes you can revisit anytime.

### Self-ExplanationAI Tutor

Explaining concepts deepens understanding. Mindgrasp's AI Tutor lets you ask questions and talk through ideas 24/7.

## You won't believe how quickly you can learn with Mindgrasp

Mindgrasp is the AI study tool that never sleeps. Upload any material and instantly get notes, flashcards, quizzes, and AI tutoring. Study anytime, from any device, in 20+ languages. What took hours now takes minutes.

[Start My Free Study Session![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/arrow-right.svg)](https://app.mindgrasp.ai/get-started)

![Learn Quickly](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/learn-quickly.webp)

## Track your progress for every study session

Mindgrasp AI study tool tracks your learning progress for each study session so you always know how much you've covered and what's left to review.

![Real-Time Tracking](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/home/tracker.svg)

See your progress update as you generate study materials for each session

### Session Checklist

### Never lose your Place

Pick up right where you left off in any study session

## One system. Built for every learner

No matter what you're studying or where you are in your journey, Mindgrasp AI study tool adapts to how you learn and helps you learn faster with less effort.

College · University · Grad Students

- ### Self-Learners


Online Courses · Independent Learning

- ### Exam Prep


Competitive · Certifications · Standardized Tests

- ### Educators


Teachers · Professors · Instructors

Whether you’re preparing for high school exams, college midterms, or graduate-level finals, you can record lectures, upload readings, and practice smarter—without last-minute cramming.

Great app. Easy to navigate and input documents. User interface was clever and intuitive. Appearance was sleek and smooth (highly attractive to older teens and young adults especially). Students with learning disabilities may need more time to adjust. But the company seems real interested in trying to develop this area. Hats off them. Regardless excellent future prospects on an already great app. Highly recommend.

![Kari Rasmussen](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/user-2.webp)

Kari Rasmussen

![Star](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/star.svg)![Star](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/star.svg)![Star](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/star.svg)![Star](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/star.svg)![Star](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/star.svg)

Have been using Mindgrasp for about a year now and can honestly say that it has boosted my academic performance so much. It has many great features but my favourite would be the flashcards option. It gathers all the info from any document and creates flashcards for you to study from. It's great when you're juggling 7 classes and don't have time to write out flashcards yourself. Excited for whats next to come!

![Amélie Laurent](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/user-3.webp)

Amélie Laurent

I highly recommend their tools. Very helpful for a teacher that needs to create quizzes from video modules. Good customer service too. Just look for their support named \[Tommy\], he can walk you through their products with some visuals.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about the product and billing.

![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/plus-circle.svg)![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/minus-circle.svg)Who is Mindgrasp for?

While Mindgrasp was first designed meet the needs of students who need to understand large amounts of information more quickly, we have found that lots of professionals enjoy the benefits of Mindgrasp too! So, we'd say that Mindgrasp is for anyone who wants to learn faster and be more productive.

![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/plus-circle.svg)![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/minus-circle.svg)Are there usage limits?

Nope! All of Mindgrasp's plans come with unlimited uploads and no daily limits on usage.

![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/plus-circle.svg)![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/minus-circle.svg)How is Mindgrasp different than other AI tools?

The big difference between Mindgrasp and other AI tools like chat GPT is that Mindgrasp was designed specifically to help you learn faster and be more productive. We put a lot of effort into making sure that Mindgrasp can support as many different types of uploading content as possible, and to ensure that both the accuracy and capability of Mindgrasp to analyze and understand this information is unmatched.

![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/plus-circle.svg)![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/minus-circle.svg)How does Mindgrasp work?

Mindgrasp will read, listen, or watch whatever you upload and then provide accurate answers, notes, summaries, flashcards, and quizzes - helping you save time and learn faster!

![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/plus-circle.svg)![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/minus-circle.svg)What types of files are accepted on Mindgrasp?

You can upload PDFs, DOCX, MP3, MP4, Powerpoints, Online Article Links, YouTube Video Links, and Vimeo Links.

## Your next study session can be smarter.

Turn lectures, readings, and links into a complete AI study system in minutes.

[Create Free Study Session![](https://www.mindgrasp.ai/assets/svgs/arrow-right.svg)](https://app.mindgrasp.ai/get-started)
